column1: Hey Hannah, just saw you filled out our Go Blue booking form. which destination were you looking to book for this spring?
Hi! We're looking for hypothetically Cancun but we're still in the phase of numbers on who will go
okay bet! Cancun is lit for sure
do you have like an approx range of ppl that would go?
yea thats solid. which school are you all from again?
Bet bet I got you. will send over a couple options, how soon were you lookin to get things booked
just peeped you started a res from a previous quote. if you were lookin for pricing thats what itll be, for reference
Ok perfect thank u! It's just going to be a waiting game now.
Word lmk soon as possible. things are moving fast
Liked “Word lmk soon as possible. things are moving fast”
hey checkin in, we narrow down on which option we wanna roll with?
Some of us booked flights already and just trying to get them into booking the room
okay word. kinda risky to book flights but not the room lol
rooms can sell out at any point in time
Yeah I know the plan is to get it done by next week and if God forbid the resort we want sells out we'd find another

Hi question, if one of us in a room of four books a flight the day after us, would they be able to still get the airport transfer from airport to resort or no since the rest of the room would be utilizing it the day prior
yea they would, everyones flight arrival/departure times are treated individually
they would be staying an extra day tho? like on the resort?
No, they'd be booking the same days as us but just flying in the day after us
ohh got you. yea we can still make sure they get picked up when they arrive
hey checkin in, did we wanna lock in the resort, inventory is running low everywhere
Hi, we will be able to finally lock it in on Thursday. We're just waiting for one person to get in a paycheck in order to actually pay for everything
Okay bet, let me see what I can set aside, whats the total amount of people now?

On the quote you had sent to my friend who forwarded it to us, it says 200$ dude 1/08 and the balance due 1/21...would we still be able to book now and do the 200$ and then the balance at a later date
Hey hey, yea we could do the $200 tonight and then the final balance will be Feb 8
Oh wait that's perfect that works great
Bet I got you. how many ppl we got now? I'll get it put together
We're just doing our room of 4. We told everyone else to fitfo themselves
okay word I'll set that up rn
what dates do you have the flight for?
or which dates did you want exactly
We land around 3pm on sat and takeoff around 9am on thrus
The email you sent says the correct dates with 5 night stay but on the website to book it says 4 night
ahh my b sorry about that
The dates changed but the price didn't, is that supposed to be the case
yea the price may take a sec to update! like on the trip page you mean?
may just have to refresh quick I see it on my end
Is the party pass schedule the same for all of the spring break companies or are they different? My friends who booked through juscollege got the schedule but I didn't know if it applies to us aswell
hey no JusCollege has their own line up for the most part. from what I know

Okay so if hypothetically my room were were to all book the 3 night party pass but our other group of friends book a 5 night party pass (we all are going through go blue) do we get the same places the same nights
Okay perfect! So once we get to the resort I assume that's when we'd get the three nights we're going out, and then the other group will also be there for those three nights on top of their extra two
yea yup, youll be able to choose which nights you want to go to when you check in with our party pass table

Hi with everything going on in Mexico right now what are the options my group has insurance on our flights but not on the resort & our two week period already closed. I have a family member who was supposed to go to Cancun this week and their trip was cancelled

Hey Hannah! so sorry idk how I missed this, but your trip is still all set and good to go. All our vendors and hotels have been operating as normal, and the U.S embassy lifted all travel restrictions last week
No worries, we ended up fighting it out anyways ! We're ready to be drunk on a beach in Cancun
yo! safe travels today. turn up lol
Yesss Cancun here the party fuckin comes!!
